title: The Broken Elevator
content: On Monday morning, the elevator in Sophia’s apartment building stopped working completely. Unfortunately, she lived on the twelfth floor and had to carry several heavy grocery bags upstairs after work. By the time she reached her apartment, she felt exhausted and slightly out of breath. Throughout the week, residents complained constantly while climbing the endless stairs every day. However, the unexpected situation also created more conversations between neighbors who usually ignored one another. People stopped to rest together, exchange jokes, and share updates about the repair process. When the elevator finally started working again, everyone felt relieved, but the building strangely seemed a little quieter afterward.
